summary: Backend-leaning full-stack engineer with 5 years of experience shipping developer tools and production APIs. Most recently at DevKit (YC W22) building CLI tooling and a TypeScript SDK used by 3,000+ developers. Strong proponent of test-driven development and async-first communication. Experienced working end-to-end in small, remote-first teams where ownership spans from design doc to deployment.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained CLI tooling and TypeScript SDK adopted by 3K+ developer accounts
Owned features end-to-end from design doc through production deployment across 8 major releases
Wrote unit and integration test suites achieving 90% code coverage on core modules
Authored technical blog posts and SDK documentation reaching 15K+ monthly visitors

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built internal platform features for serverless deployment infrastructure
Contributed to open-source Next.js tooling focused on developer experience improvements
Operated in a fully remote team spanning 4 time zones, communicating through written RFCs and async standups

experience.title: Contract Developer
bullets: Built 3 web applications for small business clients using React and Node.js
